rawLevel: Exercise a high degree of caution
summary: Exercise a high degree of caution in Indonesia overall. Avoid non-essential travel to the provinces of Papua and West Papua due to civil unrest and an ongoing armed separatist movement. Avoid non-essential travel to parts of Maluku province and Central Sulawesi (Poso region) due to ongoing security risks.

rawLevel: Exercise a high degree of caution
summary: Exercise a high degree of caution in Thailand overall. Avoid non-essential travel to the provinces of Yala, Pattani, Narathiwat and Songkhla due to ongoing insurgency and risk of terrorist attacks. Avoid all travel to the border area with Cambodia within 20 km of the border due to armed conflict and landmines.
